title: announce: Missing __all__ exports in coords.py
description:
File: python/src/lichen/announce/coords.py

The coords.py module exports functions like encode_coords, decode_coords, encode_congestion, etc. but does not define __all__.

While __init__.py re-exports from messages.py, processor.py, and scheduler.py, it does NOT re-export anything from coords.py:

```python
# __init__.py imports from:
from lichen.announce.messages import ...
from lichen.announce.processor import ...  
from lichen.announce.scheduler import ...
# coords.py not imported!
```

This means users must import directly from coords.py:
```python
from lichen.announce.coords import encode_coords  # Required
from lichen.announce import encode_coords  # Fails!
```

Either:
1. Add coords.py exports to __init__.py __all__
2. Add __all__ to coords.py to document public API
3. Document that coords functions are internal
close_reason: Added re-exports for coords.py functions and constants to announce/__init__.py and updated __all__; verified with package-level imports
